channel.title: Relationship Advice on MinWeb
channel.description: Recent content in Relationship Advice on MinWeb

item.title: Why You Should Stop Saying "We Need to Talk
item.description: Stop using the phrase we need to talk to prevent unnecessary panic and defensiveness by replacing vague communication with clarity to build psychological...

item.title: Stop Saying “Let Me Know If I Can Help” (Do This Instead)
item.description: Stop saying let me know if I can help and learn how to offer meaningful support that reduces cognitive load for those navigating grief or a major crisis.
